## Summary

Describe the user-facing or system-facing change.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Grounding Checks

- [ ] Live and fallback data are clearly labeled in the UI.
- [ ] New AI responses remain grounded in scraped records or explicit fallback notes.
- [ ] Any new source connector includes parser notes, failure handling, and tests when practical.
